sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The swaps worked! Now I have:
- Red rect: [O, Y, R] - all warm colors
- Green rect: [M, p, N, b] - all cool colors
This is the warm/cool color sorting hypothesis. Let me now try SPACE to see if this arrangement completes the level.
Current state:
- Red=[O,Y,R] (warm: orange, yellow, red)
- Green=[M,p,N,b] (cool: magenta, purple, light green, blue)
Let me try SPACE now.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Swaps completed! Now Red=[O,Y,R] (warm), Green=[M,p,N,b] (cool)
# Testing warm/cool color sort hypothesis
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
dots = {}
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] == 16 and n['color'] not in ['c', 'g', 'G', 'W', 'B']:
        b = n['boundary']
        cr = sum(r for r,c in b) // len(b)
        cc = sum(c for r,c in b) // len(b)
        dots[(cr, cc)] = n['color']
print("Red dots (row 22):", {v: k for r,c in sorted(dots.keys()) if r==22 for v in [dots[(r,c)]]})
print("Green dots (row 36):", {v: k for r,c in sorted(dots.keys()) if r==36 for v in [dots[(r,c)]]})

# Try SPACE to submit
action(['SPACE'])
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
{"game_tier": {"action_semantics": {"SPACE": "Only changes timer, never completes level", "MOUSE": "Click dot to select, click another to swap colors", "ACTION7": "Error"}, "object_taxonomy": {"top_panel": "7 colored squares at row 3", "red_rect": "3 dots", "green_rect": "4 dots"}, "hud_map": {"timer_bar": "row 53"}, "win_pattern": {"unknown": "Need new hypothesis"}, "level_log": {"level_2": "123 actions"}, "cross_level_notes": {}}, "level_tier": {"world_model": "Red=[O,Y,R], Green=[M,p,N,b] - warm/cool sorted", "goal_model": "Warm(O,R,Y)→red rect, cool(p,b,N,M)→green rect", "recent_findings": ["Swaps work, achieved warm/cool arrangement"], "open_questions": ["Does warm/cool sort complete the level?"], "current_plan": "Try SPACE with warm/cool arrangement", "strategy_log": ["All positional arrangements failed, trying color property sort"], "failed_probes": ["All arrangements + SPACE", "ACTION7", "bottom squares", "white corners", "top row palette", "SPACE with dot selected", "T-dot click"]}}
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
